name: Different Arrays
input:
The first line contains one integer $n$ ($3 \le n \le 300$).
The second line contains $n$ integers $a_1, a_2, \dots, a_n$ ($0 \le a_i \le 300$).
output: Print one integer — the number of reachable arrays. Since the answer can be very large, print its remainder modulo $998244353$.
